scripts.dev:flutter: cd flutter-app && flutter run --profile -d web-server --web-port 5001 --web-hostname localhost
scripts.dev:flutter-debug: cd flutter-app && flutter run --debug -d web-server --web-port 5001 --web-hostname localhost
scripts.kill: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :5001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'ports cleared'
